title: House rules.
field_audio_hint: Sub matches Japanese audio with subtitles. Dub uses dubbed audio.
field_quality_hint: "Best" lets the source pick. Lower values cap the resolution.
field_external_player_hint_prefix: Command launched by "Open in external player". Defaults to
field_auto_play_next_hint: When the current episode ends, advance to the next one automatically. Stops at the last episode of the series.
field_download_bar_hint: Slim accent strip across the bottom while downloads run. Disabled = downloads still work, but progress is only visible from the topbar download icon.
field_auto_skip_op_hint: Jump past the OP automatically when one is detected. Off by default — you can still use the manual Skip button. Powered by aniskip's crowd-sourced timestamps.
field_auto_skip_ed_hint: Jump past the ED automatically when one is detected. Pairs well with Auto-play next for binge sessions.
field_custom_controls_hint: Replace Chromium's native bar with our themed one. The accent-coloured timeline matches each show and the Skip OP/Outro button stays visible during fullscreen. Off uses Chromium's bar (better for PiP and the native captions menu).
field_auto_update_anicli_hint: On launch, run the upstream ani-cli script's self-update if the cached copy is older than a day. allmanga's API drifts daily; when this is off, scraper fixes upstream takes hours after they ship don't reach you until the next ani-gui release.
field_disable_pip_hint: By default, navigating away from the player while a video is playing pops it into a Picture-in-Picture window so you can keep watching while browsing. Turn this on to pause playback on navigation instead. Episode-to-episode navigation never triggers PiP regardless.
field_language_hint: UI strings. Title language is independent.
field_image_cache_cap_hint: Posters and banners cached to disk. Older entries evicted when the cap is hit.
field_clear_images_hint_prefix: Removes posters and thumbnails on disk at
field_clear_images_hint_suffix: . Useful after a Kitsu re-cataloguing or to reclaim disk before the LRU prune kicks in.
about_ani_cli_description: — the 666-line POSIX-shell scraper this app drives.
about_disclaimer_text: ani-gui scrapes public sources. Use only where local laws permit. The maintainers don't operate, host, or guarantee any of the upstream content.
